# HireBest

> AI-powered resume screener for hiring teams. Upload CVs, paste a job description, and get ranked candidates with reasoning, missing-skills analysis, and 5 tailored interview questions in seconds. Used by recruiters who need to triage 50+ applications per role.

## Key facts

- Median time to score 100 CVs: **38 seconds**
- Agreement with senior recruiters in internal testing: **94%**
- Supported CV formats: PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG, SVG (OCR-based, via OpenAI Vision)
- Pricing: $400/year (Basic) → $900/year (Advanced) → $1,500 one-time (Custom Integrated) → $200/month (Retainer)
- Free tier: 50 screenings, no credit card required
- Hosting: Vercel + Supabase + OpenAI gpt-4o-mini
- Payments: Lemon Squeezy (cards, no PayPal required)

## Pages

- [Home](https://hirebest.online/): Product overview, savings calculator vs Greenhouse, plan comparison, FAQ.
- [Pricing](https://hirebest.online/pricing): 4 tiers with feature matrix and pricing FAQ.
- [Analytics](https://hirebest.online/analytics): Hiring analytics features — screening velocity, fit ratio, missing-skill heatmap, time-to-shortlist.
- [Contact](https://hirebest.online/contact): WhatsApp +880 1324 419 060 or contact@hirebest.online.

## Blog

- [Why 'AI ATS' is the Wrong Way to Think About Hiring](https://hirebest.online/blog/ai-ats-wrong-way-to-think): Opinion piece arguing AI screening is a different product category from ATS.
- [Greenhouse Pricing in 2026: What's Really Going On](https://hirebest.online/blog/greenhouse-pricing-2026): Industry analysis — Greenhouse Essential starts $5,000–$6,500/yr; per-seat pricing and renewal hikes break the math.
- [How to Screen 100 CVs in 38 Seconds](https://hirebest.online/blog/screen-100-cvs-in-38-seconds): Tutorial explaining the parallel extraction + matching + output-generation pipeline.

## Comparisons

- [HireBest vs Greenhouse](https://hirebest.online/vs-greenhouse): $400/yr vs ~$7,000/yr; AI-first screening vs enterprise ATS workflows.
- [HireBest vs Workable](https://hirebest.online/vs-workable): $400/yr vs $299/month; yearly billing vs monthly meter.
- [HireBest vs Lever](https://hirebest.online/vs-lever): $400/yr vs $5,000–$25,000+/yr; AI-first vs CRM with bolted-on AI.

## Free tools

- [AI Interview Question Generator](https://hirebest.online/tools/interview-questions): Paste a JD, get 5 tailored interview questions with ideal answers. No signup, no usage limit.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://hirebest.online/privacy-policy): GDPR + CCPA compliant; CVs stay in user's workspace; not used for training.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://hirebest.online/terms-and-conditions): AI outputs are decision-support, not final hiring decisions.
- [Refund Policy](https://hirebest.online/refund-policy): 7-day full refund on one-time plans; monthly retainer cancellable anytime.
